heading: Omitted
label: 921 to 929 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 921, , , related to forfeiture of any and all lands within indemnity limits of land grants to the Northern Pacific Railroad.act June 25, 1929, ch. 41, § 146 Stat. 41Section 922, , , related to forfeiture of all unsatisfied indemnity selection rights.act June 25, 1929, ch. 41, § 246 Stat. 42Section 923, , , related to effect of provisions of this chapter on various prior statutory provisions affecting the railroad.act June 25, 1929, ch. 41, § 346 Stat. 42Section 924, , , related to effect of provisions of this chapter on title to rights of way actually in use by railroad.act June 25, 1929, ch. 41, § 446 Stat. 42Section 925, , , authorized Attorney General to institute and prosecute all suits affecting title to lands.act June 25, 1929, ch. 41, § 546 Stat. 42Section 926, , , related to restitution by railroads of lands which were not earned or erroneously credited.act June 25, 1929, ch. 41, § 646 Stat. 43Section 927, , , related to jurisdiction of suits.act June 25, 1929, ch. 41, § 746 Stat. 43Section 928, , , related to reports and recommendations to Congress concerning final determinations in such actions.act June 25, 1929, ch. 41, § 846 Stat. 44Section 929, , , related to withholding of approval of adjustments of land grants pending final determination of actions.act June 25, 1929, ch. 41, § 946 Stat. 44
